x-enumeration-literals.name: Transactional Relationship
x-enumeration-literals.description: A basic, short-term, service-based interaction focused on specific deliverables.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Relationship
x-enumeration-literals.description: Partners work together more consistently to support ongoing operations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collaborative Relationship
x-enumeration-literals.description: Both parties actively work together to improve processes, products, or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Strategic Relationship
x-enumeration-literals.description: A long-term, high-value relationship aligned with core business objectives.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Alliance Relationship
x-enumeration-literals.description: The highest level of development, where partners innovate and create new business models together.
